summary: Provided existing seeded admin/staff test accounts and reworked the admin area into a system-overview dashboard. Backend: extended AdminDashboardController with monthly revenue (groupBy=day|month on /revenue), a new /sales-history endpoint (paid auctions: product, seller, buyer, final price, 20% commission, seller payout, paidAt) and a new /contracts endpoint (all electronic contracts with type, related party, fileUrl), plus SalesHistoryDTO and ContractRowDTO; used @Transactional(readOnly) for lazy loads. Frontend: extended dashboardService (adminBalance, monthly param, getSalesHistory, getContracts, new types); built /admin/dashboard (KPI grid, day/month revenue bar chart, quick links to staff tools, recent sales + recent contracts previews), /admin/sales-history (GMV/commission totals, search, table), /admin/contracts (filter tabs + PDF links); reworked AdminSidebar into grouped sections (Tong quan, Van hanh Staff, Kinh doanh, Quan tri) including staff feature links; redirected /admin to /admin/dashboard; added a guard to StaffShell allowing both Staff and Admin so admin inherits staff features. Verified KYC + withdrawal + product-approval endpoints already allow the Admin role. Backend compiles; frontend has no lint errors.
current_status: Admin now has a dedicated overview dashboard (revenue by day/month, sales history, electronic contracts) and full access to staff features via grouped sidebar. Test accounts already exist via seeder. Pending: restart backend to expose the new /admin/dashboard endpoints; data populates as real auctions/contracts/transactions are created.
